title: Communauté de communes du Vimeu Vert
summary: The Communauté de communes du Vimeu Vert  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Picardie région of France. It was created in December 1993. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Vimeu in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Vimeu Vert  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Picardie région of France. It was created in December 1993. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Vimeu in January 2017.

Composition
This Communauté de communes included 12 communes:
